title: Starshine Player Totems
body:
# Starshine Player Totems
Starshine Player Totems requires CIT Resewn and Animatica, or Optifine. 

### Other our resource packs:
- [Starshine Essentials](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/starshine_essentials)
- [Starshine Foods & Drinks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/starshine-foods-and-drinks)
